---
title: "Clue 1"
---

```{=html}
<div class="clue-page clue-morph">
<div class="flowers-bg">
  <div class="flower flower-1"><svg viewBox="0 0 50 70" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><line x1="25" y1="70" x2="25" y2="30" stroke="#4a3a6a" stroke-width="2"/><ellipse cx="25" cy="20" rx="12" ry="10" fill="rgba(200,100,255,0.5)" stroke="rgba(200,100,255,0.7)" stroke-width="1"/><circle cx="25" cy="20" r="4" fill="rgba(255,220,100,0.6)"/><ellipse cx="15" cy="45" rx="6" ry="3" fill="rgba(80,60,100,0.4)" transform="rotate(-30 15 45)"/></svg></div>
  <div class="flower flower-2"><svg viewBox="0 0 50 70" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><line x1="25" y1="70" x2="25" y2="30" stroke="#4a3a6a" stroke-width="2"/><ellipse cx="25" cy="20" rx="10" ry="9" fill="rgba(255,100,180,0.5)" stroke="rgba(255,100,180,0.7)" stroke-width="1"/><circle cx="25" cy="20" r="3" fill="rgba(255,220,100,0.6)"/><ellipse cx="33" cy="50" rx="5" ry="3" fill="rgba(80,60,100,0.4)" transform="rotate(30 33 50)"/></svg></div>
  <div class="flower flower-3"><svg viewBox="0 0 50 70" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><line x1="25" y1="70" x2="25" y2="28" stroke="#4a3a6a" stroke-width="2"/><ellipse cx="25" cy="18" rx="13" ry="11" fill="rgba(100,150,255,0.5)" stroke="rgba(100,150,255,0.7)" stroke-width="1"/><circle cx="25" cy="18" r="4" fill="rgba(255,240,120,0.6)"/><ellipse cx="12" cy="48" rx="7" ry="3" fill="rgba(80,60,100,0.4)" transform="rotate(-35 12 48)"/></svg></div>
  <div class="flower flower-4"><svg viewBox="0 0 50 70" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><line x1="25" y1="70" x2="25" y2="32" stroke="#4a3a6a" stroke-width="2"/><ellipse cx="25" cy="22" rx="9" ry="8" fill="rgba(180,120,255,0.5)" stroke="rgba(180,120,255,0.7)" stroke-width="1"/><circle cx="25" cy="22" r="3" fill="rgba(255,220,100,0.6)"/></svg></div>
  <div class="flower flower-5"><svg viewBox="0 0 50 70" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><line x1="25" y1="70" x2="25" y2="30" stroke="#4a3a6a" stroke-width="2"/><ellipse cx="25" cy="20" rx="11" ry="9" fill="rgba(255,150,200,0.5)" stroke="rgba(255,150,200,0.7)" stroke-width="1"/><circle cx="25" cy="20" r="3" fill="rgba(255,220,100,0.6)"/><ellipse cx="35" cy="48" rx="6" ry="3" fill="rgba(80,60,100,0.4)" transform="rotate(35 35 48)"/></svg></div>
  <div class="flower flower-6"><svg viewBox="0 0 50 70" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><line x1="25" y1="70" x2="25" y2="28" stroke="#4a3a6a" stroke-width="2"/><ellipse cx="25" cy="18" rx="12" ry="10" fill="rgba(120,180,255,0.5)" stroke="rgba(120,180,255,0.7)" stroke-width="1"/><circle cx="25" cy="18" r="4" fill="rgba(255,240,120,0.6)"/><ellipse cx="14" cy="50" rx="6" ry="3" fill="rgba(80,60,100,0.4)" transform="rotate(-30 14 50)"/></svg></div>
  <div class="flower flower-7"><svg viewBox="0 0 50 70" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><line x1="25" y1="70" x2="25" y2="32" stroke="#4a3a6a" stroke-width="2"/><ellipse cx="25" cy="22" rx="10" ry="8" fill="rgba(220,100,255,0.5)" stroke="rgba(220,100,255,0.7)" stroke-width="1"/><circle cx="25" cy="22" r="3" fill="rgba(255,240,120,0.6)"/></svg></div>
  <div class="flower flower-8"><svg viewBox="0 0 50 70" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><line x1="25" y1="70" x2="25" y2="30" stroke="#4a3a6a" stroke-width="2"/><ellipse cx="25" cy="20" rx="11" ry="10" fill="rgba(255,120,160,0.5)" stroke="rgba(255,120,160,0.7)" stroke-width="1"/><circle cx="25" cy="20" r="4" fill="rgba(255,220,100,0.6)"/><ellipse cx="36" cy="50" rx="5" ry="3" fill="rgba(80,60,100,0.4)" transform="rotate(30 36 50)"/></svg></div>
  <div class="flower flower-9"><svg viewBox="0 0 50 70" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><line x1="25" y1="70" x2="25" y2="30" stroke="#4a3a6a" stroke-width="2"/><ellipse cx="25" cy="20" rx="10" ry="9" fill="rgba(150,130,255,0.5)" stroke="rgba(150,130,255,0.7)" stroke-width="1"/><circle cx="25" cy="20" r="3" fill="rgba(255,220,100,0.6)"/></svg></div>
  <div class="flower flower-10"><svg viewBox="0 0 50 70" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><line x1="25" y1="70" x2="25" y2="32" stroke="#4a3a6a" stroke-width="2"/><ellipse cx="25" cy="22" rx="9" ry="8" fill="rgba(255,180,220,0.5)" stroke="rgba(255,180,220,0.7)" stroke-width="1"/><circle cx="25" cy="22" r="3" fill="rgba(255,240,120,0.6)"/></svg></div>
  <div class="flower flower-11"><svg viewBox="0 0 50 70" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><line x1="25" y1="70" x2="25" y2="30" stroke="#4a3a6a" stroke-width="2"/><ellipse cx="25" cy="20" rx="11" ry="9" fill="rgba(170,100,255,0.5)" stroke="rgba(170,100,255,0.7)" stroke-width="1"/><circle cx="25" cy="20" r="3" fill="rgba(255,220,100,0.6)"/><ellipse cx="36" cy="48" rx="5" ry="3" fill="rgba(80,60,100,0.4)" transform="rotate(30 36 48)"/></svg></div>
  <div class="flower flower-12"><svg viewBox="0 0 50 70" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><line x1="25" y1="70" x2="25" y2="28" stroke="#4a3a6a" stroke-width="2"/><ellipse cx="25" cy="18" rx="12" ry="10" fill="rgba(255,100,200,0.5)" stroke="rgba(255,100,200,0.7)" stroke-width="1"/><circle cx="25" cy="18" r="4" fill="rgba(255,240,120,0.6)"/><ellipse cx="14" cy="50" rx="6" ry="3" fill="rgba(80,60,100,0.4)" transform="rotate(-30 14 50)"/></svg></div>
  <div class="flower flower-13"><svg viewBox="0 0 50 70" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><line x1="25" y1="70" x2="25" y2="30" stroke="#4a3a6a" stroke-width="2"/><ellipse cx="25" cy="20" rx="10" ry="9" fill="rgba(100,200,255,0.5)" stroke="rgba(100,200,255,0.7)" stroke-width="1"/><circle cx="25" cy="20" r="3" fill="rgba(255,220,100,0.6)"/></svg></div>
  <div class="flower flower-14"><svg viewBox="0 0 50 70" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><line x1="25" y1="70" x2="25" y2="32" stroke="#4a3a6a" stroke-width="2"/><ellipse cx="25" cy="22" rx="11" ry="9" fill="rgba(200,150,255,0.5)" stroke="rgba(200,150,255,0.7)" stroke-width="1"/><circle cx="25" cy="22" r="4" fill="rgba(255,240,120,0.6)"/><ellipse cx="15" cy="48" rx="6" ry="3" fill="rgba(80,60,100,0.4)" transform="rotate(-30 15 48)"/></svg></div>
  <div class="flower flower-15"><svg viewBox="0 0 50 70" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><line x1="25" y1="70" x2="25" y2="30" stroke="#4a3a6a" stroke-width="2"/><ellipse cx="25" cy="20" rx="10" ry="8" fill="rgba(255,160,180,0.5)" stroke="rgba(255,160,180,0.7)" stroke-width="1"/><circle cx="25" cy="20" r="3" fill="rgba(255,220,100,0.6)"/></svg></div>
  <div class="flower flower-16"><svg viewBox="0 0 50 70" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><line x1="25" y1="70" x2="25" y2="28" stroke="#4a3a6a" stroke-width="2"/><ellipse cx="25" cy="18" rx="12" ry="10" fill="rgba(130,160,255,0.5)" stroke="rgba(130,160,255,0.7)" stroke-width="1"/><circle cx="25" cy="18" r="4" fill="rgba(255,240,120,0.6)"/><ellipse cx="35" cy="50" rx="5" ry="3" fill="rgba(80,60,100,0.4)" transform="rotate(35 35 50)"/></svg></div>
  <div class="flower flower-17"><svg viewBox="0 0 50 70" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><line x1="25" y1="70" x2="25" y2="32" stroke="#4a3a6a" stroke-width="2"/><ellipse cx="25" cy="22" rx="9" ry="8" fill="rgba(240,130,220,0.5)" stroke="rgba(240,130,220,0.7)" stroke-width="1"/><circle cx="25" cy="22" r="3" fill="rgba(255,240,120,0.6)"/></svg></div>
  <div class="flower flower-18"><svg viewBox="0 0 50 70" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><line x1="25" y1="70" x2="25" y2="30" stroke="#4a3a6a" stroke-width="2"/><ellipse cx="25" cy="20" rx="11" ry="9" fill="rgba(180,180,255,0.5)" stroke="rgba(180,180,255,0.7)" stroke-width="1"/><circle cx="25" cy="20" r="3" fill="rgba(255,220,100,0.6)"/><ellipse cx="36" cy="48" rx="5" ry="3" fill="rgba(80,60,100,0.4)" transform="rotate(30 36 48)"/></svg></div>
</div>
<div class="clue-box">
  <h1>Clue 1</h1>
  <p>The first whisper of the cosmos reveals itself here. Placeholder content — replace with your actual clue.</p>
  <p><a href="../">Back to the Heart</a></p>
</div>
</div>
```
